description: An ultimate life management, productivity, and budget tracking application with Notion-like intuitive design, Apple's smoothness, and Anthropic's clean agentic AI interface.
archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Beige/Cream base, grounded, calm) combined with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for structural clarity and high-contrast typography.

typography.strategy: High contrast typesetting. Use tracking-tight for Manrope headings. Overlines should be uppercase with tracking-[0.2em] in Figtree.

layout_strategy.general: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use large padding (p-8 to p-12) for outer containers. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision. Mobile-first responsive.
layout_strategy.dashboard_grid: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. Dense and compact for widgets, gap-6. Spans: Summary col-span-1, Main chart col-span-2 or 3.
layout_strategy.borders_and_radius: Subtle roundness. Maximum 8px (rounded-lg) for cards and modals. Use 1px solid borders rather than heavy shadows to delineate space (Notion-style).

components.buttons: Flat design. Primary buttons use background color, no shadow. Hover state: slightly lighter/darker hue with text color explicitly set.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Use 1px border, transparent background, focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-primary.
components.cards: Cardless or flat cards. 1px border border-border/60, bg-surface. No default shadow. Hover: shadow-sm.
components.calendar: Custom grid layout leveraging pure HTML/Tailwind for month/week/day views. Use Shadcn for internal controls (date picker). Clean time-blocks.
components.kanban: Horizontal scrolling flex container. Columns with muted backgrounds, draggable cards with 1px borders.
components.ai_chat: Claude/Anthropic style. Agentic chat workflow with collapsible tool-calls. Live preview pane. User messages are right-aligned or styled distinctly, AI messages are left-aligned with a subtle ai_accent_surface background.
components.icons: lucide-react for universal, clean, mono-weight iconography.
components.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit hover states on all interactive elements (e.g. hover:bg-surface_secondary).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Subtle and fast. transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interactions.active: Active/Focus states must have high contrast rings.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Micro-interactions for task completion (e.g. strikethrough animation, small scale-down on click).

background_texture.description: Minimalist beige abstract texture for empty states or subtle hero backgrounds

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Notion-like sidebar navigation with collapsible sections.
Implement a light/dark mode toggle affecting the Tailwind classes at the root.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for custom layouts (like Kanban or multi-view Calendar), do not over-rely on rigid Shadcn structural components.
For the budget AI component, build a side-panel or inline conversational interface styled like Anthropic's Claude (clean, readable text, subtle AI accents, conversational loops).
Currency must be hardcoded or formatted as Euro (€).
Use 'Manrope' for headings and 'Figtree' for body text. Configure these in Tailwind config.
Ensure all buttons, inputs, and links have 'data-testid' attributes.
Layout should utilize a high-density dashboard grid for tracking views but maintain plenty of padding and whitespace within the containers.
